creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Don't know which extra details. Compilation is hanging at that point
that I posted.
Shortly I thought it is a enviroment problem on my system (cause it
compiled fine in poudriere). But after
I tried it in the VBox (which a I had another 10.3 system with less 
packages installed, should be relatively clean) and got the same errors
I don't think it is my system.
